strengths: 10+ years full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB
Hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work including MCP code generators
Strong testing/craftsmanship background (TDD, Vitest-era stacks, workshops on testing)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in the resume
Limited recent Kotlin/Java exposure; Java work is from older robotics roles
Cloud experience narrow (AWS CDK only); no GCP/Azure or Kubernetes depth shown beyond self-hosted GISCollective

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP tooling experience

response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the experience bar with broad full-stack delivery across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB, plus current hands-on work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling that directly matches the role's emphasis. Gaps exist around Nest.js specifically and recent Kotlin/Java production work, but the underlying engineering breadth, testing discipline, and architectural experience suggest a strong fit for the internal automation tooling context.
